solutions.title: Unified Health API Gateway
solutions.description: A standardized API gateway that connects divergent EHR systems and formats them into a single, cohesive patient profile using FHIR standards to enable seamless interoperability.

solutions.title: Dynamic Grid Routing Engine
solutions.description: An AI-powered routing engine that utilizes real-time traffic data and grid segregation to dynamically adjust last-mile delivery routes on the fly, minimizing latency and fuel spend.
